description_long: This house features a single-story, elongated rectangular layout with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior is accented by a mix of neutral tones, with sections of white, brown, and gray, and is surrounded by landscaped green areas and several stylized trees. The driveway leads to a prominent entryway, which is slightly recessed and flanked by large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof design, and a backyard area with additional greenery. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with larger panes concentrated near the entrance and smaller windows distributed along the sides. The overall structure is low-profile, emphasizing horizontal lines and open spaces typical of contemporary residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, neutral exterior colors, and landscaped surroundings, featuring large windows and a prominent driveway entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, backyard greenery, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear facade, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entry, window arrangement, and driveway extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent recessed entry with large glass panels, direct driveway access, and minimal decorative elements
